name: Banana Burrito WW
recipeInstructions:
1. Lay the tortilla on a flat surface; spread evenly with peanut butter and raspberry spread. Sprinkle with coconut if desired.
2. Place banana on the edge of the tortilla; roll up to enclose it. Wrap loosely in paper towel.
3. Microwave on High for 35 seconds.
Note: Use the red low calorie (8 calories per spoon) raspberry spread. This serving provides: 1 fat, 1 protein, 1 bread, 1 fruit, and 20 optional calories (add 5 optional calories if coconut is used). Per serving: 232 calories, 7 g protein, 10 g fat, 31 g carbohydrate, 49 mg calcium, 216 mg sodium, 0 mg cholesterol, 3 g dietary fiber.
